name: spoo · webhooks
description: Webhook dispatch, delivery health, and endpoint lifecycle. Refresh 60s.

query.apl:
['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_dispatched"
| summarize total = count()
| project total

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_delivered" and is_test != true
| summarize total = count()
| project total

['spoo-prod']
| where event in ("webhook_delivered", "webhook_delivery_attempt_failed")
| summarize total = count(), ok = countif(event == "webhook_delivered")
| project rate = round(100.0 * ok / total, 2)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_delivered"
| summarize p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95)
| project p95

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_dispatched"
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), event_type

['spoo-prod']
| where event in ("webhook_delivered", "webhook_delivery_attempt_failed")
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), event

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_delivery_attempt_failed"
| extend code = coalesce(tostring(status_code), "transport")
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), code

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_endpoint_disabled"
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), reason

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_delivery_dropped_over_cap"
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), event_type

['spoo-prod']
| where event in ("domain_event_sink_fallback", "webhook_executor_tick_failed", "domain_event_inline_dispatch_failed", "webhook_click_fanout_failed")
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), event

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_delivered"
| summarize p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95), deliveries = count() by endpoint_id
| sort by p95 desc
| take 10

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "webhook_delivery_attempt_failed"
| summarize failures = count(), last_error = arg_max(_time, error) by endpoint_id
| sort by failures desc
| take 10
